name: Baked Lasagna
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion, garlic, and meat in shortening for about 20 minutes.
2. Add the next four ingredients (tomato sauce, oregano, pepper) with 1 tsp salt.
3. Simmer for 40 minutes.
4. Cook noodles with 1 tbsp salt for 20 minutes; drain.
5. Put 1/3 of the meat mixture in a baking dish.
6. Add a layer of noodles, then add 1/2 cup cottage cheese, 1/3 Mozzarella, and 1/2 Cheddar.
7. Repeat layers, ending with the remaining meat mixture and top with the remaining 1/3 Mozzarella cheese.
